expertAssessments.rationale: The SDD gate added failing tests before implementation, targeted Vitest covered the new UI contracts, and production Playwright verified desktop/mobile DOM target sizes and route theme tokens.
GitLab main and semver tag pipelines completed successfully, production /api/version serves 8.11.57, and Vercel usage remains normal.

The AI assistant UI changes preserve AI core entry points, System Context provider routing visibility, and the single AI Engine status presentation without changing the Cloud Tasks or model execution path.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after v8.11.57 production QA; effective $18.4121, billed $0.0000, no unexpected billed usage.

artifacts.label: v8.11.57 AI assistant UX polish QA summary

completedImprovements.title: AI Assistant typography scale, touch target, light surface, System Context status, and provider routing polish
completedImprovements.note: Production Playwright validated desktop 24px targets, mobile 44px targets, light route theme tokens, and System Context copy/state consolidation on v8.11.57.

notes: Two QA-caught regressions were fixed before this passing run: v8.11.55 retained the global dark body background token, and v8.11.56 left the mobile input action buttons at 36x36.
This is targeted AI assistant UX QA, not a broad route-pack run.
